acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_prose_001] In the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:289-345, no sentence may present Lucille's or Vernon's private conclusion as objective fact unless Della could know it firsthand. Their motives must be rendered through observable tells or clearly signaled inference from Della's vantage, while the reader can still track why Della now reads Vernon as dangerous and Lucille as already seeing the next filing coming.

[chapter_04_prose_002] Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:367, no more than one evaluative 'That was ...' punch sentence remains. Each revised beat must still read as emphatic on the page, but the emphasis has to come from distinct concrete language rather than the repeated template.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised versions of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:289-345, no sentence may present Lucille's or Vernon's private conclusion as objective fact unless Della could know it firsthand. Their motives must be rendered through observable tells or clearly signaled inference from Della's vantage, while the reader can still track why Della now reads Vernon as dangerous and Lucille as already seeing the next filing coming.
findings.problem: The narration briefly slips out of Della-close third and states other characters' internal processing as fact. 'The clerk in her had already heard the file trying to form,' 'He had expected her to be useful,' and 'The set of his shoulders said he had already begun calculating' all move past Della's perception into asserted omniscience, which conflicts with the style bible's required narrative distance.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:289, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:345, recast Lucille's and Vernon's motives as Della's inference from visible behavior. Keep the threat and bureaucratic intelligence legible, but route them through gesture, tone, timing, or explicitly marked interpretation instead of flatly stating what those characters already know, expect, or plan.

findings.acceptance_test: Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:367, no more than one evaluative 'That was ...' punch sentence remains. Each revised beat must still read as emphatic on the page, but the emphasis has to come from distinct concrete language rather than the repeated template.
findings.problem: The chapter leans four times on the same evaluative punch-sentence construction, 'That was ...', to mark importance. By the fourth recurrence, the emphasis feels pre-shaped rather than discovered in scene, which flattens a prose mode that is otherwise stronger when it stays concrete and bodily.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the emphatic sentences at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:7, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:199, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_04.md:367. Keep at most one 'That was ...' verdict sentence in the chapter; convert the other cited beats into concrete image, gesture, or Della-shaped thought so each emphasis lands differently.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally compromised caretaking, the bureaucratic brutality of naming, and the physical labor of moving the dead. When an edge case appears, prefer the detail a witness would remember over the phrasing a polite narrator would use. Let tenderness exist inside harsh material without cleaning the harshness off.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If childbirth, exhumation, poverty, sexual history, bodily decay, or violence enters a scene, render it through specific sensation and consequence; summarizing away the hard fact counts as a failed pass, not tasteful restraint.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High overall; contractions are the norm across dialogue, with fuller forms reserved for class performance, legal formality, deliberate emphasis, or a character trying not to lose composure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate public labor chapters with quieter domestic or inventory chapters, vary scene count and dialogue density, let some chapters turn on information or paperwork rather than confrontation, and ensure no two consecutive chapters share the same dominant mechanism, pace, or emotional temperature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken historical Appalachian-Southern English without caricature; concrete, unsentimental, regionally grounded, and alert to how legal language clashes with lived speech.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Della Bledsoe, intimate enough to track bodily memory and evasive thought while never slipping into other characters' interior monologue as fact
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular work-sentence compression with longer accumulating sentences that carry memory, atmosphere, and moral weight; let cadence tighten in hearings and exhumations, then widen in domestic or reflective passages.
